stemHtml: If incorrect data was entered into the EFB, would performance calculations be affected?

options.a: Yes, the take-off speeds may be incorrect.
options.b: No, the flight crew will leave them as initially planned.
options.c: Yes, the centre of gravity calculation will be incorrect.
options.d: No, the take-off speeds will be automatically corrected as the whole purpose of the EFB is to assist the flight crew and provide a safety barrier.
